PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven software engineer with 5 years of professional experience building scalable
backend systems and REST APIs. Proven track record of delivering high-quality software in
fast-paced startup environments. Passionate about clean architecture and developer tooling.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | 2021 – Present
• Architected Python microservices handling 10 million daily requests with 99.9% uptime
• Led migration from monolithic to distributed architecture, reducing API latency by 40%
• Mentored 3 junior engineers and established team coding standards and review processes
• Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker

Software Engineer | DataFlow Systems | 2019 – 2021
• Developed real-time data processing pipelines using Apache Kafka and Python
• Built REST APIs consumed by over 50 internal teams across the organization
• Improved critical database query performance by 35% through indexing and optimization
• Collaborated with product managers to translate requirements into technical specifications

Junior Developer | WebAgency Co. | 2018 – 2019
• Created responsive web applications using React and TypeScript for various clients
• Implemented UI components based on Figma design specifications
• Participated in agile ceremonies and contributed to sprint planning and retrospectives
